zh.lifeSummary: 當John de la Lynde II於1407年出生在英國多瑟特文特爾布恩 賀林斯同時，他的父親John de la Lynde I33歲，母親Isolda Heryng27歲。他與Lady Elizabeth Mallet在英國波克夏文特爾布恩結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1509年9月17日在英國英格蘭多瑟特文特爾布恩 可倫斯同享年102歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de la Lynde II于1407年出生在英国多瑟特文特爾布恩 賀林斯同时，他的父亲John de la Lynde I33岁，母亲Isolda Heryng27岁。他与Lady Elizabeth Mallet在英国波克夏文特爾布恩结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1509年9月17日在英国英格兰多瑟特文特爾布恩 可倫斯同享年102岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Lynde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Lind
meanings: Scandinavian, English, and Dutch: topographic name for someone who lived by a lime tree, Scandinavian and Middle English lind. As a Swedish name, it is often of ornamental origin.
North German and Danish: habitational name from any of various places called with Lind ‘lime tree’.
South German, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): nickname for a gentle, mild, tolerant man, from Middle High German lint, linde, Yiddish lind ‘gentle, mild’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John de la Lynde II was born in 1407, in Winterbourne Herringstone, Dorset, England, his father, John de la Lynde I, was 33 and his mother, Isolda Heryng, was 27. He married Lady Elizabeth Mallet in Winterbourne, Berkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 17 September 1509, in Winterbourne Clenstone, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 102.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de la Lynde II est né en 1407, à Winterbourne Herringstone, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, John de la Lynde I, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Isolda Heryng, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth Mallet à Winterbourne, Berkshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 17 septembre 1509, à Winterbourne Clenstone, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 102 ans.

Er hat in Winterbourne, Berkshire, England Lady Elizabeth Mallet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 17. ja.lifeSummary: John de la Lynde IIが1407年にイギリスドールセトウィンテルボウルン ハーリングストーンで生まれた時，父John de la Lynde Iは33歳，母Isolda Heryngは27歳であった。イギリスバークシュアイアウィンテルボウルンでLady Elizabeth Malletと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1509年9月17日にイギリスイギリスドールセトウィンテルボウルン クレンストーンで102歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de la Lynde II(이)가 1407년 영국 도르세트 윈터보우른 허링스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de la Lynde I(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Isolda Heryng(은)는 27세였다. 그는 영국 버크실르 윈터보우른에서 Lady Elizabeth Mallet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1509년 9월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 윈터보우른 클렌스톤에서 102세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de la Lynde II родился в 1407 г. в местности винтирбурн хиррингстоун, дорсет, Англия, его отцу по имени John de la Lynde I было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Isolda Heryng, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth Mallet в местности винтирбурн, биркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 17 сентября 1509 г. в местности винтирбурн кленстоун, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 102 лет.
